svg.title: Olist lakehouse high-level architecture
svg.desc: Medallion architecture on Databricks GCP: GCS sources flow through Bronze, Silver, Gold layers via Auto Loader and Spark, served via SQL Warehouse and Delta Sharing, all governed by Unity Catalog and orchestrated via DABs and Git.

g.text: Auto Loader, schema evolution, exact source preservation
Type fixes, dedup, derived columns, 2 UC SQL UDFs
Denormalized, query-shaped, one table per business question
